creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Adam Jimerson from comment #2)
I don't know if somebody's working on that.

I've looked at it one week ago and it seemed like it had some packaging issues not allowing to trivially use it like other cheeseshop packages. Looks like there were some work to improve that though.

I guess the correct directory for that would be "devel" or "www", or you talking about something else?
